meta.race_name: Bet £10 Get £40 With BetMGM Fillies' Novice Stakes (GBB Race)

rankings.name: Welcome Retreat
key_positive_factors: Highest Top Speed (TS 59) and joint-highest RPR (77) in the field
Luke Morris is a specialist at Wolverhampton
Consistent runner-up form (2-2) suggests she is bang on the premises
key_risks: Still a maiden after five starts
May lack the progression of the less exposed types

rankings.name: Champonie
key_positive_factors: Only winner in the field following successful debut at Newcastle
Jockey Billy Loughnane and trainer George Boughey are a lethal combination on AW
Significant potential for improvement from first run
key_risks: Speed figure (TS 26) needs to take a major step forward

rankings.name: Egotistical
key_positive_factors: Excellent TS of 58 puts her right in the mix
Improved from debut when just beaten at Newcastle
Varian/Mitchell combo is high-percentage
key_risks: Indicated as a non-runner in latest updates
Return to 6f is a positive but must prove it on track

rankings.name: Paradise Walk
key_positive_factors: High RPR of 75 on debut at Chelmsford
Ralph Beckett is expert at finding improvement in second-season fillies
Drawn well in stall 4 for a tactical advantage
key_risks: TS of 29 is low compared to the principals

rankings.name: Sizzling Seixas
key_positive_factors: Expensive 130k yearling by Havana Grey
Clive Cox stable often has newcomers well-schooled for debut
Market support would be a very positive indicator
key_risks: Lack of racecourse experience compared to seasoned rivals
Wears a hood on debut which can be a sign of early greenness

rankings.name: Timescape
key_positive_factors: Showed high-level ability (RPR 77) as a two-year-old
Stable (K R Burke) capable of reviving underperformers
key_risks: Finished last of five on recent return here
Has a significant amount to prove after a long layoff

rankings.name: Seven Of Hearts
key_positive_factors: Marginal improvement in RPR (52) on second start
key_risks: Looks a long-term project for handicaps
Beaten fairly comfortably over 5f here last month

rankings.name: Gris De Chine
key_positive_factors: Marco Ghiani is an eye-catching jockey booking
key_risks: Stable not known for winning with newcomers
Likely to benefit from the experience

rankings.name: Pam's Sonnet
key_positive_factors: None significant
key_risks: Well held at big prices in two starts
Current form (RPR 50) is insufficient for this grade
